generated_oml:
instance TMC4671EvalMotorController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor controller (TMC4671 Eval) that drives cart and hoist stepper motors"
]
instance PythonControlApplication : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Python control application that sends actuator command signals to physical crane interface"
]
instance ArduinoController : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based controller handling electromagnet and sensor readout"
]
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Swing angle encoder that measures crane swing"
]
instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Anemometer measuring wind speed and direction"
]
instance ArduinoSensorReadout : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino reads sensor data and controls electromagnet"
]
instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]
instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]
instance ElectromagnetStateDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom ArduinoSensorReadout
]
instance SwingAngleDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Recorded swing angle data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]
instance WindSpeedDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed time‑series data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]
instance ElectromagnetStateDataStored : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Electromagnet state and sensor data stored in TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:fromData ElectromagnetStateDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TimescaleDB
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MQTTBroker
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]
instance SimulatedTrajectoryData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated trajectory data produced by simulation model"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
    DTDFVocab:inputTo ValidationEnabler
]
instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "TimescaleDB database for real‑time logging of crane data"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeDataLoggingService
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]
instance MQTTBroker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Eclipse Mosquitto MQTT broker broadcasting measurements to services"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance GrafanaDashboard : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Grafana visualization dashboard for real‑time monitoring"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]
instance ValidationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for continuous validation service that compares measured and simulated trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:enables ContinuousValidationService
]
instance FaultDetectionEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for fault detection service that classifies time‑series data"
    DTDFVocab:enables FaultDetectionService
]
instance TrajectoryGenerationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for optimal trajectory generation service"
    DTDFVocab:enables OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService
]
instance SimulationEnabler : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Enabler for simulation service that simulates crane motion"
    DTDFVocab:enables SimulationService
]
instance RealTimeDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service logging real‑time data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeDataLoggingInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides LogDataAction
]
instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service validating measured trajectories against simulation"
    DTDFVocab:provides ContinuousValidationAccuracyInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidateTrajectoryAction
]
instance FaultDetectionService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service detecting faults using time‑series classification"
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultDetectionAlert
    DTDFVocab:provides FaultAlertAction
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryGenerationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service generating optimal trajectories for crane motion"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryPlanInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides GenerateOptimalTrajectoryAction
]
instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service simulating crane motion based on kinematic and control models"
    DTDFVocab:provides SimulatedTrajectoryData
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service visualizing real‑time data in Grafana dashboards"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizeDataAction
]
instance RealTimeDataLoggingInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Confirmation that real‑time data has been successfully logged into TimescaleDB"
]
instance ContinuousValidationAccuracyInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Metric indicating accuracy of measured trajectories compared to simulated trajectories"
]
instance FaultDetectionAlert : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Alert raised when fault detection service identifies anomaly in crane operation"
]
instance OptimalTrajectoryPlanInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Recommended optimal trajectory plan for crane operation"
]
instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real‑time visualization of telemetry in Grafana dashboard"
]
instance LogDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Store incoming measurement data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance GenerateOptimalTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Compute optimal trajectory for next operation cycle"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance FaultAlertAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Issue alert to operator upon fault detection"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]
instance ValidateTrajectoryAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Compare measured and simulated trajectories for validation"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance VisualizeDataAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Publish data to Grafana dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]
instance CadFusionModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "CAD model of crane created in Autodesk Fusion"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Kinematic model describing crane arm motions"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance ControlLoopSimulationModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Simulation model of control loops for motor drivers"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SimulationEnabler
]
instance TrajectoryGeneratorModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for generating optimal trajectories"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo TrajectoryGenerationEnabler
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "The control application generates desired trajectories and publishes command messages via the physical crane interface to the motor controllers; the trajectory generator may send optimal motion plans; continuous validation service can trigger notifications that influence operator actions via the HMI."
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Near real‑time logging and validation (seconds to sub‑seconds sampling); trajectory generation and simulation are performed offline or at the start of a maneuver; continuous validation runs concurrently with physical operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "A Docker‑compose orchestrated set of containers: TimescaleDB, Mosquitto MQTT broker, Grafana dashboard; Python modules for physical crane interface, control app, logging app, HMI; services for trajectory generation, simulation, and continuous validation that communicate via MQTT and the shared database."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "Design phase (CAD and kinematic model development), manufacturing phase (assembling the crane hardware), and operation phase (continuous validation, fault detection, and real‑time control)."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Model validation through continuous comparison of measured vs simulated trajectories, distance metrics, and thresholds; fault detection via time‑series classification; uncertainty considered by confidence bounds in Grafana; overall reliance on open‑source tools allows reproducibility."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "Inter‑service communication uses MQTT (Eclipse Mosquitto) over local network; physical interface communicates with motor controllers via serial/CAN (not explicitly specified); data transmission to database uses PostgreSQL protocol."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "All software components deployed as Docker containers on a single personal computer; GPU/CPU virtualization not required; system is open‑source and available on GitHub; Python modules are pip‑installable."
]

instance horizontal_integration : DTDFVocab:HoriIntegration [
    base:desc "Not specified in the document."
]

instance data_ownership_and_privacy : DTDFVocab:DataOwnershipPrivacy [
    base:desc "Not specified in the document."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "No specific industrial or interoperability standards (e.g., OPC UA, IEC 61850) are referenced; the system relies on open‑source libraries and custom protocols."
]

instance security_and_safety_considerations : DTDFVocab:SecuritySafety [
    base:desc "No explicit discussion on cybersecurity or operational safety; the system appears to operate locally with no remote command execution described."
]
